# Carrot Mails

Carrot Mails is a permission-based email tool for founders, teams, and small businesses to send personalized, one-to-one email from their own Gmail inbox to contacts who have explicitly opted in. It is designed for newsletters, customer updates, opt-in launches, and CRM-style customer communication, not unsolicited outreach.

Every list must be marked as consented before sending. Every message includes clear sender identity and a working one-click unsubscribe (RFC 8058 List-Unsubscribe header). Replies are detected automatically and future sends to that recipient pause. Bounces and unsubscribes flow into a global suppression list.

The product includes an opt-in campaign engine with throttling and daily caps, reusable HTML templates, contact lists with consent metadata, embeddable signup forms, and unsubscribe handling. Pricing is $3.50/month for the Premium plan (5,000 sends/month) or $49.50 once for lifetime access with unlimited sending. There is no free tier: sending is unlocked after purchase.
